item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1min Manchester City on @BernardoCSilva 's exit: "The Club and all of our fans will now take the
item.description: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1min Manchester City on @BernardoCSilva 's exit: "The Club and all of our fans will now take the time to deliver a fitting tribute and farewell to a wonderful servant of Manchester City Football Club at the end of the season..." 5 8 64 65 605

item.title:

item.title: FPL_Harry: Harry @FPL_Harry · 18min Going to be very interesting when @LiveFPLnet updates to see how many fixtures people have...
item.description:
Harry @FPL_Harry · 18min Going to be very interesting when @LiveFPLnet updates to see how many fixtures people have...
Maximium possible 30 excluding captaincy. (if you are on Triple captain, count it as x2 not x3) 11-20 21-22 23-27 28-30 130 votos · 23 horas restantes 6 1 11 3 mil

item.title:
footballontnt: Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 4min "Now is not the time in my career to think about myself..."
Nottingham For
item.description:
Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 4min "Now is not the time in my career to think about myself..."
Nottingham Forest manager Vítor Pereira says he's just focusing on getting the club results right now 7 1 11 2 mil
